entry.title: Share Fix Fee of March 2026
entry.content:
Sharing Extra Rewards (Fix Fee Rewards or Epoch Fee Rewards) from Pool’s Operator of Epoch has block in March 2026 has been completed.
If you belong to the top delegators, check your wallet to see Received amount. More detailed at link.
Thank you!
entry.summary: Sharing Extra Rewards (Fix Fee Rewards or Epoch Fee Rewards) from Pool’s Operator of Epoch has block in March 2026 has been completed. If you belong to the top delegators, check your wallet to see Received amount. More detailed at link. Thank you!

entry.title: Delegate to Drep Peter Bui
entry.content:
As a Staker/Holder, I delegated my voting power to Peter Bui (drep1yftc8zs7gjcj4a9nxzplz4wg6cwweya0kxp8adnw59vsyrqvrysud).
This DRep may represent Holders and Single Pool Operators.
Regards.
entry.summary: As a Staker/Holder, I delegated my voting power to Peter Bui (drep1yftc8zs7gjcj4a9nxzplz4wg6cwweya0kxp8adnw59vsyrqvrysud). This DRep may represent Holders and Single Pool Operators. Regards.

entry.title: Voted for Cardano Foundation as New Managing Entity of Project Catalyst

link.title: Voted for Cardano Foundation as New Managing Entity of Project Catalyst

entry.content:
As a Stake Pool Operator, I voted YES for Approve Cardano Foundation as New Managing Entity of Project Catalyst (gov_action1k5vwlfrxtyusd2ec37tckd54gjvqn2kd72xj4t6wkkapdv7zfg0qt9akfm).
Regards.
entry.summary: As a Stake Pool Operator, I voted YES for Approve Cardano Foundation as New Managing Entity of Project Catalyst (gov_action1k5vwlfrxtyusd2ec37tckd54gjvqn2kd72xj4t6wkkapdv7zfg0qt9akfm). Regards.

entry.title: Voted for Budget Process Framework
entry.content:
As a Stake Pool Operator, I voted YES for Cardano Budget Process Framework (facilitated by Intersect) (facilitated by Intersect) (gov_action1a95na44kgedjk3k64ajpfp4p9d9jj3sgzc6tt9nmnkvgj7c9nraqgqu3p4).
Regards.
entry.summary: As a Stake Pool Operator, I voted YES for Cardano Budget Process Framework (facilitated by Intersect) (facilitated by Intersect) (gov_action1a95na44kgedjk3k64ajpfp4p9d9jj3sgzc6tt9nmnkvgj7c9nraqgqu3p4). Regards.

entry.title: How to Delegate Voting Power to a Drep

link.title: How to Delegate Voting Power to a Drep

entry.content:
DREP is like a ‘congressperson’ of Delegators in the Cardano Block-chain Governance. To vote for some important decisions affect entire block-chain.
Please be noted that delegate to a DREP is not like delegate/stake to a pool, it won’t earn any rewards or change the pool you’ve already delegated. Delegate to a DREP is just delegate your voting power to someone to vote for you and your will.
To delegate for a DREP:

Step 1: From your main view in Yoroi app, go to {Menu}

Step 2: Go to {Governance centre}

Step 3: You can select either Delegate to a DREP or choose Abstain or No. In this guidance, I selected DREP

Step 4: Input the DREP's ID who I want to vote for

Step 5 (Final): Confirm
entry.summary: DREP is like a ‘congressperson’ of Delegators in the Cardano Block-chain Governance. To vote for some important decisions affect entire block-chain. Please be noted that delegate to a DREP is not like delegate/stake to a pool, it won’t earn any rewards or change the pool you’ve already delegated. Delegate to a DREP is just delegate your voting power to someone to vote for you and your will. To delegate for a DREP: Step 1: From your main view in Yoroi app, go to {Menu} Step 2: Go to {Governance centre} Step 3: You can select either Delegate to a DREP or choose Abstain or No. In this guidance, I selected DREP Step 4: Input the DREP's ID who I want to vote for Step 5 (Final): Confirm

entry.title: Voted for Add Constitutional Committee
entry.content:
As a Stake Pool Operator, I voted YES for Add Constitutional Committee Member (gov_action1fk4nx9zhkcdcyjaudwjtnkd7gagwyhqtth2zypawkc78gvdxkuzqzcfpwy).
Regards.
entry.summary: As a Stake Pool Operator, I voted YES for Add Constitutional Committee Member (gov_action1fk4nx9zhkcdcyjaudwjtnkd7gagwyhqtth2zypawkc78gvdxkuzqzcfpwy). Regards.
